Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I heard Yamagishi-san fainted again, and she's taking days off from school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I wonder if she's okay... She doesn't look very strong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Yamagishi-san is absent today, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}There are lots of classrooms here... But you knew that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}The sign on the door to the home economics room looks like it was written in another language.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}It's hard to read... It doesn't look like English...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}And if you listen close, you can hear mysterious voices inside...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I can't bring myself to go in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}There's a science teacher who brews his coffee in the test tubes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I wonder how it tastes... It seems kinda nasty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}When I think of art, I think of landscapes, or still lifes, or things like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}But it seems like most of the guys just think about nude figure drawing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}When I think of home economics, I think about cooking experiments, and that kind of thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I hear that some people burn their textbooks by accident by setting them too close to the stove.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I heard that on the 17th, the culture clubs are going to have openings for new members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}But it seems like most of them are already at capacity, so only the art club is recruiting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Each club room isn't that big, so I'm not surprised that they're limiting the number of members.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}The culture clubs' recruitment drive seems to have started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Only the art club is recruiting this year. It looks like you can go take a look at their activities first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Culture clubs have a different feel than the sports clubs. They seem interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}You know how you use rubbing alcohol for science experiments?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Well, I heard there's a teacher who drinks it, saying it's as good as regular alcohol...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}But that can't be good for you! I wouldn't try it if I were you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Believe me, it's not worth it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}When I think of artists, I think of those people who squint and hold a pencil up to their subject.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Artists who do that, especially the guys in my class, just want to look the part...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Guys never seem to be able to do much in home economics.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}You mean there are guys who are good at sewing? That sounds wonderful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}They're going to have trouble if they ever decide to live on their own, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}As for me, if my button fell off or something, I'd be able to sew it back on in a second![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}The music textbooks always have the faces of great musicians on the covers, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}The boys in my class just like to scribble on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Sorry to ask this so suddenly, but do you like chemistry?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Chemistry is such a fun subject. I look forward to every experiment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}When you're mixing sulfuric acid with water, you're not supposed to pour the water into the acid.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}It's the opposite. You're supposed to pour the acid into the water, little by little.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Trust me... That's how it's done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Happy Henry Likes Beer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Every teacher has his or her own personal mnemonic for the first few elements in the Periodic Table.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I think our teacher's is one of the more unique ones...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}You should study some more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}The other day, I saw something weird on the Internet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}It was a high school chemistry forum that said they put a container of water in the middle of the school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}They dropped in one mole of sodium, causing a huge explosion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Too bad it wasn't filmed... I would have liked to see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Do you wash your lab coat after experiments?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Ah, so you like cleanliness! I think that's a wonderful trait in men.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}My classmate didn't wash his either, and now there's a hole in it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}You should be careful about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Don't you worry sometimes about the stains the art students leave?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I know they work with paint, but they should still clean up after themselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}Every year, there's a huge clean-up effort... They could save time if they would do it every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}It's filthy in front of the art class... Can't they clean up after themselves?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}It's like that all over now, with the posters all over town...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}With all that, plus those scary cultist freaks, I don't feel safe walking around town anymore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}I saw someone putting up those cult posters the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 316}When I think about people trying to recruit me into a cult, I get scared to go into town...[n]{f 1 1}
